fields.helpText: Name the search category by which the list of business rules will be generated.
Name the file from which the value of the search category will be selected.
Identify the cross-reference in file 8930.1 to be used in building the list for business rules which apply to the search category in question.

This field must be valid MUMPS code which sets DIC("S") for the selection of the search value (e.g., S DIC("S")="I $O(^USR(8930.1,""B"",+Y,0))" would require that any DOCUMENT to be selected must have at least one rule that pertains to it).
